title: Infinity Stones - Eye of Ender recipe
description: A new Eye of Ender recipe that has one item from every new biome/structure to encourage exploration (crafts all 12 at once)
body:
# What this pack does

This datapack replaces the current **Eye of Ender recipe** with a **brand new** one in order to **encourage exploration** in Minecraft.

## The recipe

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GHau9FJD/images/e8b4ef39e145471a59101c0a75d761e640c84b96.png)

_(Sorry for the blurry image)_

## _"Why do I need this?"_

Over the past **10 years** or so, Mojang have kept adding more and more **cool content** to the game that nobody is actually trying out.

**They keep adding biomes, structures and items** whilst **not encouraging anybody to explore them**, players instead decide to **speedrun** their way to the end and beat the Ender Dragon just to quit their world right after and **never** explore the new content.

Instead of fixing this big issue with the game, Mojang seem to have dedicated the last 2 years of their development time making copper slightly more useful.

But now, yes now, you and your **friends** _(if you have any)_ can have a good reason to visit **all** of the new structures and biomes Mojang have added for your **_two week Minecraft phase_**.

# What are you waiting for? Try it!
Just download and install this simple datapack to transform your Minecraft experience into a more explorational game and less of a "grindfest"
